productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Pink Tops
description: Composition Majenta sleeveless knit top made of 100% cotton, crocheted till the empire waist, has a draw cord at the bust and has a full front button placket Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Enjoy the winter in style in this knit top from united colors of benetton. The empire waist enhances your feminine look multi-fold. Pair this with jeans or skirts and sleek sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
